001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.controller;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.AcceptedStateDescriptionUpdateRequest;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.AcceptedState;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.AcceptedStateService;
006import java.net.URI;
007import java.util.List;
008import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
009import org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;
010import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
011import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
012import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;
013import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
014import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PatchMapping;
015import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
016import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
017import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
018import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
019import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ResponseStatus;
020import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
021
022import static org.springframework.hateoas.server.mvc.WebMvcLinkBuilder.linkTo;
023import static org.springframework.hateoas.server.mvc.WebMvcLinkBuilder.methodOn;
024
025/**
026 * REST controller exposing manager-only accepted-state administration endpoints.
027 */
028@RestController
029@RequestMapping("/manager/accepted-states")
030public class ManagerAcceptedStateController {
031
032  private final AcceptedStateService service;
033
034  /**
035   * Creates a controller exposing manager-only accepted-state administration operations.
036   *
037   * @param service accepted state service.
038   */
039  @Autowired
040  public ManagerAcceptedStateController(AcceptedStateService service) {
041    this.service = service;
042  }
043
044  /**
045   * Returns all accepted states.
046   *
047   * @return list of accepted states.
048   */
049  @GetMapping(produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
050  public List<AcceptedState> getAll() {
051    return service.getAll();
052  }
053
054  /**
055   * Returns a single accepted state by status tag.
056   *
057   * @param statusTag accepted-state status tag.
058   * @return accepted state entity.
059   */
060  @GetMapping(path = "/{statusTag}", produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
061  public AcceptedState getAcceptedState(@PathVariable String statusTag) {
062    return service.getByStatusTag(statusTag);
063  }
064
065  /**
066   * Creates a new accepted state.
067   *
068   * @param newAcceptedState accepted state to create.
069   * @return response containing the created entity and a {@code Location} header.
070   */
071  @PostMapping(consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE, produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
072  public ResponseEntity<AcceptedState> createAcceptedState(@RequestBody AcceptedState newAcceptedState) {
073    AcceptedState created = service.createNewAcceptedState(newAcceptedState);
074    URI location = linkTo(methodOn(ManagerAcceptedStateController.class)
075        .getAcceptedState(created.getStatusTag()))
076        .toUri();
077    return ResponseEntity.created(location).body(created);
078  }
079
080  /**
081   * Updates the description of an accepted state.
082   *
083   * @param statusTag accepted-state status tag.
084   * @param request request payload containing the new description.
085   * @return updated accepted state.
086   */
087  @PatchMapping(path = "/{statusTag}", consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE,
088      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
089  public AcceptedState updateAcceptedStateDescription(
090      @PathVariable String statusTag,
091      @RequestBody AcceptedStateDescriptionUpdateRequest request
092  ) {
093    return service.updateAcceptedStateDescription(statusTag, request.getStatusTagDescription());
094  }
095
096  /**
097   * Deletes an accepted state if it is not currently referenced by any reports.
098   *
099   * @param statusTag accepted-state status tag.
100   */
101  @DeleteMapping(path = "/{statusTag}")
102  @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.NO_CONTENT)
103  public void deleteUnusedAcceptedState(@PathVariable String statusTag) {
104    service.deleteUnusedAcceptedState(statusTag);
105  }
106
107}
